title: adelphia mirabilis
intro: Adelphia mirabilis, also known as Mirabilis jalapa or the Marvel of Peru, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its vibrant red and white flowers and edible roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Adelphia mirabilis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and poultices for various health issues.
